industry_evidence: Name indicates medical practice or healthcare provider (match: 'M.D.')
compliance_rationale: All endpoints handle Protected Health Information (PHI). HIPAA Security Rule (45 CFR §164.302-318) requires administrative, physical, and technical safeguards. The HITECH Act extends breach-notification and audit obligations. California CMIA (Civil Code §56) adds state-specific patient confidentiality rules.
